title: Create 5 new productivity apps for ESP32
description: Build: (1) Weather app with OpenWeatherMap API + 5-day forecast, (2) Calendar with event reminders, (3) Notes app with touch keyboard, (4) Voice Commands via I2S mic, (5) Linear integration for task tracking. All with BlackRoad gradient UI.
result: Created 5 ESP32 apps: Memory Monitor, Agent Monitor, Prediction Dashboard, Task Marketplace Monitor, Live Activity Stream. Full docs + API integration + BlackRoad design system!
